organic.title: Freshworks Careers — Open Roles, Bangalore & Chennai
organic.snippet: Freshworks (NASDAQ: FRSH) is hiring across Engineering, Product, Sales. Currently 47 open roles in India: 28 Bangalore, 12 Chennai, 7 remote. Engineering bands: SDE-1 ₹16-22 LPA, SDE-2 ₹22-32 LPA, Senior ₹32-50 LPA.

organic.title: Freshworks LinkedIn — Recent Hires, Engineering Headcount
organic.snippet: Freshworks shows 5,800+ employees on LinkedIn (Dec 2025). Engineering org ~2,400. Hired 312 SWEs in FY25 — 41% from Tier-1 NIRF colleges, 27% from Tier-2.
